library.title: Library
library.subtitle: Updates, protocols & companion
library.updatesCaption: Curated by ViMed. In production this feed is posted by an admin or an AI agent that fetches from defined trusted resources.
library.companionGreeting: Hi — I'm your ViMed health companion. My answers draw only from [trusted source] and are for information, not medical advice. What would you like to look up?
library.companionReply: Here's a general summary based on [trusted source]. In the production build this connects to the live source of truth and returns sourced answers. For clinical decisions, please confirm against the full guideline.
library.askPlaceholder: Ask about a condition or protocol

updates.title: Updated hypertension targets for adults over 60
MOH expands biosimilar coverage across tertiary centers
Inhaler technique and adherence in pediatric asthma

protocols.body: First-line metformin; add GLP-1 or SGLT2 per CV risk.
Lifestyle + ACE/ARB or CCB; target per age and comorbidity.
Stepwise ICS-based control; review inhaler technique each visit.
Emollients + topical steroids; escalate to systemic if severe.
Guideline-directed quadruple therapy; titrate to tolerance.
LABA/LAMA bronchodilation; add ICS for frequent exacerbators.
